## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests
- [ ] `cmd/` commands stay thin (flag parsing only, no business logic)
- [ ] `aquadirector.yaml.example` updated if config changed
